ops.body:
**Recon gate: CLEAN-PROCEED (2026-07-19).** Full gate report = fusekit doc 0cf0502.

The one genuine wire incompatibility — daemonkit wire.Server's version/rejected/reason/err/payload envelope vs synckit's frozen flat ok/result/error — is neutralized by adopting SUB-PRIMITIVES only (wire.Framing + PeerFromConn + trust.Policy + proc.SingleEntrant/Flock/Backoff) while KEEPING synckit's Request/Response structs, rpc.Dispatcher, the Unix + ServeConn loops, XDG paths, and PID->SID plumbing. wire.Server / wire.ReadJSON and daemonkit paths are OUT of scope (a lane drifting toward them re-opens the gate). Consumer freeze holds because cookiesync (v0.16.0) + reposync (v0.9.0) pin old module versions; ErrLockBusy is the sole sentinel move, handled by aliasing (hostregistry.ErrLockBusy = proc.ErrLockBusy), never re-declaration.

**Scope decision for this session** (target criterion 518d812, local green, NO releases/cutover): U0 (baseline green) -> U1 (semantic pins + frame goldens = the 518d812 gate) -> U2 (dep wiring) -> U3 (Unix server core swap) -> U4 (proc adoption) -> U5 (drain.Simple) -> U7 (service.Agent serve-only) -> U8 (consumer interop gate). **U6 (version/skew/takeover) is DEFERRED** — the gate report marks it a separable phase-2 net-new capability (synckit has no version eviction today) with a missing Installed-version reader; it is not part of "preserved semantics" and stays for a follow-up. Criteria 8c434ba (live converge) + 9f21ed1 (host cutover) stay pending per the no-cutover scope.

**Gate conditions:** baseline is NOT green today (TestReloadRPCGenerationOutlivesRequest race + 2 authkit failures) — U0 fixes it before any structural diff; U1 goldens must pin "params":null (no omitempty) and the exact "unknown method %q" text (reposync string-matches it).
